description_for_model: ProAltus Group is a UK-wide specialist access and safety contractor founded in 2008, delivering rope access, fall protection, facade maintenance, debris netting, external cleaning, glazing, roofing, and facilities management services. They are IRATA-certified, Constructionline Gold registered, SafeContractor approved, CHAS accredited, IPAF and PASMA certified. They operate nationwide across the UK including London, Greater London, Essex, Cardiff, Bristol, Jersey and Guernsey.
description_for_human: ProAltus Group — UK specialist rope access, fall protection, facade maintenance and work at height contractor.

company.name: ProAltus Group

address.street: Unit 22, Hall Barn Road Industrial Estate, Hall Barn Road

company.description: ProAltus Group is one of the UK's leading specialist access and safety contractors. Founded in 2008, the company delivers rope access, fall protection design and installation, facade maintenance, debris netting, external cleaning, glazing, roofing, and facilities management services. With IRATA-trained operatives and experienced consultants, ProAltus works across commercial, residential, heritage, and construction sectors throughout the UK.
accreditations: CHAS (Contractors Health and Safety Assessment Scheme)
PASMA (Prefabricated Access Suppliers and Manufacturers Association)

services.name: Rope Access
services.description: IRATA-certified rope access services for facade works, surveys, repairs, cleaning, installation and maintenance across the UK. ProAltus deploy trained operatives to safely access any building or structure without costly scaffolding.

services.name: Fall Protection Consultancy
services.description: Strategic consultancy for designing and reviewing fall protection systems to meet BS 7883, BS EN 795 and Work at Height Regulations 2005.

services.name: Access Strategy & Design
services.description: Bespoke access strategy and design for new developments and existing buildings. Works with architects, contractors and FM teams to plan safe long-term access to roofs and facades.

services.name: Fall Protection Supply, Installation & Certification
services.description: Complete design, supply, installation and certification of permanent fall protection systems including eyebolts, horizontal lifelines, guardrails, fixed ladders and anchor points. Certified to EN 795 and BS 7883:2019.

services.name: Fall Protection Testing & Inspection
services.description: Statutory inspection and testing of fixed fall protection systems. Full written reports and certification issued in compliance with BS 7883.

services.name: Bespoke Debris Netting Solutions
services.description: Custom-designed debris and safety netting systems for construction sites, shopping centres, public spaces and residential properties. Compliant with BS EN 1263.

services.name: External Cleaning
services.description: High-level external cleaning via rope access including DOFF steam cleaning for historic and listed buildings, facade washing, curtain wall cleaning and window cleaning.

services.name: Glazing
services.description: Access-led glazing services including glass replacement, sash window replacement, fire-rated glazing and curtain wall support via rope access.

services.name: Roofing
services.description: Roof repair, replacement and restoration including slate, tiled and flat roof systems with integrated fall protection and access planning.

services.name: Facilities Management Services
services.description: Planned preventative maintenance (PPM) and reactive building fabric maintenance for FM providers, property managers and managing agents.

case_studies.title: Facade Lighting — The Dorchester Hotel, Park Lane, London
case_studies.description: Rope access installation of 27 luminaires across the south facade of The Dorchester Hotel. Temporary deadweight anchors, exclusion zones and out-of-hours working on this prestigious live site.

case_studies.title: Debris Netting — Whitgift Centre Redevelopment, Croydon, London
case_studies.description: Innovative bespoke tensioned netting system protecting shoppers during a £29 million retail redevelopment in Croydon, London.

case_studies.title: Stone Cladding Installation — Carrington Street, Mayfair, London
case_studies.description: Rope access and spider crane operations for stone cladding at a super-prime Mayfair development with 28 luxury units. Client: Ardmore Construction.

case_studies.title: Roof Access Safety Upgrade — Watling Street, City of London
case_studies.description: Replacement of unsafe ladders and timber steps at a multi-level City of London commercial property with galvanised fixed ladders and non-penetrative guardrails.

case_studies.title: Roof Access Safety Upgrade — Spring House, London NW5
case_studies.description: BS 4211-compliant fixed ladders, non-penetrative guardrails and level transitions at a multi-level commercial building in North London.

case_studies.title: Historic Building Restoration — Heals Building, Fitzrovia, London W1T
case_studies.description: DOFF cleaning and facade refurbishment of the iconic Heals Building including structural repairs to cladding, windows and gutters.

case_studies.title: DOFF Cleaning — Barnard's Inn, London EC4A
case_studies.description: Large-scale DOFF facade cleaning on historic listed buildings in EC4A. Weekend working to minimise tenant disruption. Client: Knight Frank.

case_studies.title: Facade Cleaning — New Bond Street, Mayfair, London
case_studies.description: IRATA two-man team carrying out weed removal and external window decoration via temporary anchorage on a period Mayfair commercial property.

case_studies.title: Facade Repairs & Debris Netting — Beaufort Gardens, Knightsbridge, London
case_studies.description: Bespoke tensioned debris netting and render repair via rope access at a prestigious Knightsbridge townhouse. Client: Faraday Property Management.

case_studies.title: Sash Window Replacement — Sloane Street, London SW1
case_studies.description: Rope access sash window replacement at a prestigious residential property managed by Cadogan Estates, avoiding costly scaffolding.

case_studies.title: Fall Arrest Eyebolts — Temple, London
case_studies.description: Installation and certification of 80 fall arrest eyebolts with 6kN pull testing and Class A stainless steel eyebolts. Client: Avondale Construction.

case_studies.title: Roof Access & Fall Protection — Albert Street, London NW1
case_studies.description: Tailored roof access and fall protection design, installation and O&M documentation for a complex multi-level Central London building.

case_studies.title: Fall Protection — Springfield Hospital, London SW17
case_studies.description: Fall protection design and installation for City & Country at Springfield Hospital SW17. Ladder restraints, mobile anchors and certified fixings installed in a single day.

case_studies.title: Fire-Rated Glazing & Facade — CRS Green Park, Mayfair, London
case_studies.description: IRATA rope access for fire-rated glass replacement and cladding on a high-spec Mayfair office redevelopment. Client: Ardmore Construction / Erbay Aluminyum.

case_studies.title: Access Strategy — Crayford Development, London DA1
case_studies.description: Innovative access strategy for a 15-block East London development using hybrid systems and load-specific designs for London Square.

case_studies.title: PPM & Maintenance — St Christopher's Place, London W1
case_studies.description: Long-term PPM programme across prestigious Central London retail locations covering surveys, repairs, facade works and scheduled cleans.

case_studies.title: Window Cleaning — Wembley Park Development, Greater London
case_studies.description: Abseiling window cleaning across multiple phases of the Wembley Park Development by John Sisk & Sons, including DOFF cleaning and snagging.

case_studies.title: Facade Cleaning — Shelley House, London SW1V
case_studies.description: DOFF cleaning of curtain wall glazing and aluminium cladding at height, restoring the facade ahead of wider refurbishment. Client: Legendre.

case_studies.title: Rope Access — Martello Tower, Essex Coast
case_studies.description: IRATA rope access vegetation removal, mortar raking and repointing at the Grade II listed Jaywick Martello Tower with full heritage sensitivity.

case_studies.title: PPM & Maintenance — University of Essex, Colchester
case_studies.description: Long-term partnership providing planned maintenance, cleaning, inspections and reactive works across the University of Essex campus.

case_studies.title: 10,000m² Glazing — Horizon Development, Jersey
case_studies.description: Rope access glazing team installing 10,000 square metres of glazing, doors and curtain walls at a waterfront development.

case_studies.title: Roof & Facade Repairs — Holland Park, London W8
case_studies.description: Roof replacement and facade repair at a high-end Holland Park residential property via rope access with minimal disruption.

case_studies.title: Kensington Odeon Redevelopment, London W8
case_studies.description: Rope access removal of 1,500m² of roofing and safe recovery of historic timber beams during conversion of the Kensington Odeon to luxury residences.

case_studies.title: Facade Restoration — Churchill House, Cardiff
case_studies.description: Facade cleaning, structural repairs and decorative re-coating at a landmark Cardiff city centre office. Crash deck gantries and safety netting. Client: Knight Frank.

case_studies.title: Safety Inspections — SS Great Britain, Bristol
case_studies.description: Access strategy and comprehensive safety inspection on the historic SS Great Britain, part of the National Historic Fleet, for the SS Great Britain Trust.
